hero.headline: Moments of laughter you can almost hear.
hero.subheadline: These are not stock photos. They are real guests, real games, and real memories from birthdays, weddings, corporates, schools, and festivals across Gujarat.

featuredMoments.title: Featured moments
featuredMoments.subtitle: Energy, participation, and connection captured at events we hosted.

browse.title: Browse by experience
browse.subtitle: Find the vibe closest to your event. Filter by experience type, no page reload needed.

grid.title: Event moments
grid.subtitle: A curated look at the play we bring to venues across Gujarat.

finalCta.headline: Ready to create your own memories?
finalCta.description: Tell us your date, venue, and crowd. We will design a game experience your guests will photograph on their own.
